understood_request: Show total receipts, shipments, and adjustments for each product at each location. This requires aggregating wms.stock_movements by movement_type (receipt, shipment, adjustment) grouped by product and location, preserving the product-location grain.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sat_stock_movement_details (
  product_location_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  load_end_dts TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  hashdiff VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  movement_id VARCHAR,
  movement_type VARCHAR,
  quantity BIGINT,
  movement_date TIMESTAMP,
  reference_doc VARCHAR
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO sat_stock_movement_details
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_location_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  NULL AS load_end_dts,
  'wms.stock_movements' AS record_source,
  md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.movement_id AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.movement_type AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.quantity AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.movement_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.reference_doc AS VARCHAR), '')))
  ) AS hashdiff,
  s.movement_id,
  s.movement_type,
  s.quantity,
  s.movement_date,
  s.reference_doc
FROM stg_wms_stock_movements s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM sat_stock_movement_details sat
  WHERE sat.product_location_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.location_id AS VARCHAR))))
  AND sat.hashdiff = md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.movement_id AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.movement_type AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.quantity AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.movement_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.reference_doc AS VARCHAR), '')))
  )
  AND sat.load_end_dts IS NULL
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_stock_movement_summary_by_product_location (
  product_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR,
  sku VARCHAR,
  location_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  location_name VARCHAR,
  total_receipts BIGINT,
  total_shipments BIGINT,
  total_adjustments BIGINT,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_stock_movement_summary_by_product_location; INSERT INTO mart_stock_movement_summary_by_product_location SELECT hp.product_bk AS product_id, spd.product_name, spd.sku, hl.location_bk AS location_id, sld.location_name, SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type = 'receipt' THEN COALESCE(ssmd.quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_receipts, SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type = 'shipment' THEN COALESCE(ssmd.quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_shipments, SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type = 'adjustment' THEN COALESCE(ssmd.quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_adjustments, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM lnk_product_location lpl INNER JOIN hub_product hp ON lpl.product_hk = hp.product_hk INNER JOIN hub_location hl ON lpl.location_hk = hl.location_hk INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk AND spd.load_end_dts IS NULL INNER JOIN sat_location_details sld ON hl.location_hk = sld.location_hk AND sld.load_end_dts IS NULL LEFT JOIN sat_stock_movement_details ssmd ON lpl.product_location_hk = ssmd.product_location_hk AND ssmd.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, hl.location_bk, sld.location_name

aggregations: SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type = 'receipt' THEN ssmd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_receipts
SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type = 'shipment' THEN ssmd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_shipments
SUM(CASE WHEN ssmd.movement_type = 'adjustment' THEN ssmd.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_adjustments
